title: Token Holders Leaderboard
description: Paginated leaderboard of every token holder with balance, percentage of supply, and rank — build airdrop lists, DAO voter registries, and holder dashboards.
useCase: Build a token holders leaderboard page for any ERC-20 showing the top 1000 holders sorted by balance, with % of total supply and wallet labels.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain only — eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
